description_long: This is an upright piano with a polished dark wood exterior, featuring a full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys. The front panel above the keyboard is smooth and reflective, with a subtle wood grain pattern visible. Two brass pedals are located at the base, indicating its acoustic nature. The sides are solid and slightly rounded, while the back is flat and unadorned, designed to be placed against a wall. The top lid appears to be closed, and there is no visible music stand. The piano's overall appearance is classic and elegant, suitable for both indoor and semi-public urban environments.
description: A polished upright piano with a full keyboard, dark wood finish, and two brass pedals. The design is classic and elegant, with a closed top lid and no visible music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, polished wood panel, and two brass pedals at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's depth, rounded side panel, and the protruding keyboard section.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the flat, closed lid and the rectangular shape of the piano.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth and the keyboard's extension from the main body.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
